extract: Pichu (Japanese: ピチュー Pichu) is an Electric-type baby Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It evolves into Pikachu when leveled up with high friendship, which evolves into Raichu when exposed to a Thunder Stone. Pichu has an alternate form called Spiky-eared Pichu that is exclusive to Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver, also making appearances in Pokémon the Series and the Pokémon Adventures manga. A special Pichu called Ukulele Pichu is the player's first Partner Pokémon in Pokémon Ranger: Guardian Signs.
